title: Nether & End - Glowing Ores
description: Makes the ores added by Nether & End glow
body:
This Texture pack makes the ores added by [Nether & End](https://modrinth.com/mod/netherandend)
Glow!

!!!NOTE: This texture pack needs Optifine or [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) to function!!!

This pack works best with other glowing ores pack (Recommended: [Glowing Emissive Ores by DeftestHawk](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/glowing-emissive-ores) ) as it only makes the ores add by the mod glow not the vanilla ones
